name: CARDINAL HEALTH INC
business: Cardinal Health, Inc. is a global healthcare services and products company providing customized solutions for hospitals, healthcare systems, pharmacies, ambulatory surgery centers, clinical laboratories, and physician offices. The company provides pharmaceuticals and medical products and cost-effective solutions that enhance the healthcare system and supply chain efficiency.

exposures.sentence: Our business and results of operations could be adversely affected if we experience a material cyber-attack or other systems breach.
